title: La cena delle beffe
writer: Sem Benelli, Alessandro Blasetti, Renato Castellani
actors: Amedeo Nazzari, Osvaldo Valenti, Clara Calamai
plot: This is an opera in four acts composed by Umberto Giordano . The story is set in Florence at the time of Lorenzo de'Medici recounts the rivalry between Gianneto Malespini and Neri Chiaramantesi for the affections of the beautiful ...
